title: refactor: improve get identity path duplicate code

comments.body: @BlackHole1, thanks for the explanations on my comments.  However, I don't have the time to dig deep at the moment, and I don't feel good about adding my own LGTM to this.  If others feel more comfortable doing so, I will not hold up the PR.
@TomSweeneyRedHat OK, thank you equally for your CR :)
